posts.raw_content:
Aside from how tragic reliving Charlie’s killing is, the trial is grade A comedy.

You have this little dysgenic worm of a man sitting in the courtroom smirking smugly. He’s a Redditor who devised a 50-IQ plan that he thinks was 200-IQ.

> Your honor. I plead not guilty! 

The prosecution just calmly walks up, puts on a video showing what clearly appears to be Tyler Robinson going to the exact scene of the murder at the exact time of the shooting.

But wait, big brain Tyler has planned for all of this. He changed his clothes half way through. He put on a different hoodie and is wearing sun glasses and a hat! Nobody will ever catch him! 

Oh wait. He is wearing the exact same sneakers. You can still see his distinct faggy dysgenic jaw which is so idiosyncratic that you can identify him from a mile away. He even gets in the same car he arrived on campus in.

His fat bitch DEI public defender knows the case is over and just starts screaming OBJECTION nonsensically. She continues doing this all throughout the autopsy report which clearly proves the murder weapon was the exact rifle with Robinson’s DNA found all over it.

But what makes it even better is it wasn’t just Robinson’s dna that was found, it was his tranny boyfriend’s too. So now in addition to the written confession, and the confession he made to his parents — this little faggot is also going to have his own tranny boyfriend, the one he killed Charlie for, come in and testify against him.

> I will kill Charlie for you, Lance!

> weird I don’t really think about you at all and am going to help the prosecution get you the electric chair

It won’t bring Charlie back but I’m happy to watch this trial go as poorly as possible for this little fag. He still is so arrogant he doesn’t seem to notice how bad this is going. When he gets sentenced to death it will be a huge shock for him and hopefully he will die of a heart attack right then and there.

But if that doesn’t happen I have a proposition. Give him the death penalty and then put an exploding microphone on his neck so scientists can use his dead body to debunk Candace Owens’ latest retarded conspiracy theory.
